Settings.ApiKeyHint: Stored locally in this browser only (not in the world database).
Settings.ApiKeySecureHint: Your API key is stored in this browser's local storage and is never written to the world database. It is still visible in browser devtools while a request is in flight, so use a dedicated key with usage limits.
Settings.ApiKeyMenuHint: Set or remove your Anthropic API key (stored locally in this browser).
Settings.ApiKeyConfigured: An API key is configured on this browser.
Settings.ApiKeyRequired: Enter an API key to save.
Settings.ApiKeyUnchanged: Existing API key kept (leave the field blank to keep the current key).
Settings.ApiKeyCleared: Anthropic API key removed from this browser.
Settings.ApiKeyMigrated: Your API key was moved from world settings to secure local storage on this browser.
Settings.ClearApiKeyConfirm: Remove the stored API key from this browser?
Settings.SystemPromptHint: Instructions sent with every request to shape Claude's behavior.
Settings.ContextLengthHint: Number of recent user/assistant turns to remember per session.
Settings.ChatEnabledHint: Allow /claude, /w claude, and /w gm-claude chat commands.
Settings.EchoToChatHint: Post query window responses as GM-only chat whispers.
Settings.ModelMigrated: Claude model updated from {from} to {to} (previous model is no longer available).

CLAUDE-MOD.NoApiKeyWarning: Configure your Anthropic API key via Configure API Key in Module Settings.

Errors.GmOnly: Only the GM can use Claude Query.
Errors.NoApiKey: Anthropic API key is not configured in module settings.
Errors.InvalidApiKey: Authentication failed. Check your Anthropic API key.
Errors.CorsBlocked: Browser access to the Anthropic API is blocked for this organization. Contact Anthropic support or use an API key from an org with browser access enabled.
Errors.InvalidModel: Invalid or retired Claude model ({detail}). Open Configure Settings → Claude Query and choose a current model.
Errors.InvalidModelGeneric: The configured Claude model was not found. Open Configure Settings → Claude Query and choose a current model.
